metadata.title: Med Flow — Your shift copilot
metadata.description: Plan shifts, monitor your workload, and make more informed decisions about work and rest.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try reloading the page.

hero.subtitle: Organize your goals, protect your health, and work sustainably — all in one place.

heroMockup.step4Detail: Congratulations! You reached your goal with balance.

problems.title: Does this sound familiar?
problems.noTimeDesc: Between shifts, there's little time left to plan finances and take care of your own health.
problems.darkGoalsDesc: Without knowing how many shifts you need, you end up working more than you should — or less than you could.
problems.burnoutDesc: Overwork builds up silently. By the time the signs appear, it's already too late.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.subtitle: Tools designed for doctors who work shifts in Brazil — from recent graduates to seasoned veterans.
features.financeDesc: Know exactly how many shifts you need to reach your goal. Track income, simulate scenarios, and make decisions with real data.
features.burnoutDesc: Continuous monitoring of your workload. Get alerts before you exceed safe limits and preserve your health.
features.planningDesc: Smart simulations that find the ideal balance between financial performance and quality of life.
features.sustainabilityDesc: Personalized energy cost by shift type and a sustainability index to keep your career healthy.

steps.title: Get started in 3 simple steps
steps.subtitle: In less than 5 minutes you'll be all set up and ready to go.
steps.step1Desc: Quick sign-up with email and password. No paperwork, no credit card.
steps.step2Desc: Define your financial goals, workload limits, and shift types.
steps.step3Desc: Log shifts, track metrics, and receive real-time insights.

benefits.title: What you get with Med Flow
benefits.subtitle: Everything a shift doctor needs to take control of their career.
benefits.clearIncome: Clear view of your monthly earnings

cta.title: Ready to work smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of doctors who already organize their shifts, take care of their health, and reach their goals with Med Flow.

forgotPassword.title: Med Flow
forgotPassword.subtitle: Recover password
forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Click the button below to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: Email not found. Please check and try again.

resetPassword.title: Med Flow
resetPassword.subtitle: Your shift copilot
resetPassword.heading: New password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new secure password for your account.
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been updated successfully. Log in to continue.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: This recovery link is invalid or has already been used.

validation.passwordComplexity: Must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number

financialProfile.title: Financial profile
financialProfile.description: This information helps us calculate how many shifts you need to work.
financialProfile.minimumGoalHint: The minimum you need to earn per month
financialProfile.idealGoalHint: How much you would like to earn per month

dashboard.greeting: {gender, select, FEMALE {Hello, Dr. {name}} MALE {Hello, Dr. {name}} other {Hello, {name}}}

monthMessages.safe: Your month is balanced. You have room for more shifts if you'd like.
monthMessages.moderate: Heads up: your workload is moderate. Take care of yourself.
monthMessages.high: Alert: your workload is high. Consider checking on your well-being.
monthMessages.noData: Set up your profile to track your month.

dashboard.simulateCtaSub: See the financial and workload impact before accepting
dashboard.configureProfile: Set up your profile to view the goal
dashboard.addShiftsForLoad: Add shifts to see your workload

hospitals.title: My Hospitals
hospitals.count: {count, plural, one {# hospital registered} other {# hospitals registered}}
hospitals.emptyState: You don't have any hospitals registered yet.
hospitals.confirmDeleteMessage: Remove this hospital and all associated shift templates? This action cannot be undone.

shifts.title: My Shifts
shifts.unrealized: {count, plural, one {# not completed} other {# not completed}}
shifts.emptyState: You don't have any shifts registered yet.
shifts.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this shift? This action cannot be undone.

finance.title: Financial Dashboard
finance.idealReached: Ideal goal reached! You can rest easy.
finance.minimumReached: Minimum goal secured. More shifts will bring you closer to the ideal goal.
finance.remainingToMinimum: You need {value} more to reach the minimum goal.
finance.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this shift? This action cannot be undone.

monthShiftsList.title: Shifts this month
monthShiftsList.unrealized: {count, plural, one {# not completed} other {# not completed}}

smartPlanner.title: Smart Planning
smartPlanner.subtitle: Optimized suggestions to reach your financial goal
smartPlanner.goalMet: Congratulations! You've already reached your ideal goal this month.
smartPlanner.financialGap: {value} remaining to reach your ideal goal.
smartPlanner.scenarioApplied: Scenario applied successfully! Shifts have been added as simulated.
smartPlanner.noSuggestionsDesc: Complete your financial profile and register hospitals with shift templates to use smart planning.
smartPlanner.noScenariosDesc: Register hospitals and shift templates to receive optimized suggestions.

simulate.title: Accept or Decline?
simulate.subtitle: Simulate a shift and see the impact before deciding.
simulate.verdictSafe: All clear! You can accept this shift.
simulate.verdictModerate: You can accept, but keep an eye on your workload.
simulate.verdictHigh: We don't recommend accepting this shift right now.
simulate.reducesSustainability: This shift reduces your sustainability (current average: {value}/exhaustion)
simulate.improvesSustainability: This shift improves your sustainability (current average: {value}/exhaustion)

riskHistory.title: Risk History
riskHistory.subtitle: Track how your workload has evolved over time.
riskHistory.emptyState: No records yet. History is generated automatically.

energy.title: Personal Energy Costs
energy.description: Adjust if you feel more or less impact than average for each shift type.
energy.onboardingRequired: Complete onboarding first to configure your energy costs.

wearables.title: Connected wearables
wearables.description: Direct integration with wearables is in development. Demo data is available.
wearables.appleHealthDesc: Health data from iPhone and Apple Watch
